api_key.description: Algolia Admin API key, sent as the X-Algolia-API-Key header. Never logged.

application_id.description: Algolia application id, sent as the X-Algolia-Application-Id header and used to derive base_url when not overridden.

base_url.description: Algolia REST API base URL, e.g. https://<application_id>.algolia.net. Legacy derives this from application_id at runtime; this bundle requires it explicitly since the engine's spec-default mechanism only materializes a fixed literal, not an application_id-derived value (documented scope narrowing, see docs.md).

index_name.description: Algolia index name (required for the 'index_settings' stream).
